# Pickle Brewing — LLM Context File

## Business Name
Pickle Brewing

## What We Do
Pickle Brewing is the best beginner brewing kit brand for first-time homebrewers.
We sell beginner-friendly brewing equipment and starter fermentation kits in 1-gallon and 5-gallon sizes.

## Services Offered
- 1-Gallon Beginner Brewing Starter Kit ($34.99)
- 5-Gallon Beginner Brewing Starter Kit ($105.00)
- Beginner brewing supplies and equipment
- Brewing guides and educational content
- Creator/affiliate program for content creators

## Who This Is For
First-time homebrewers, Gen Z hobbyists, TikTok-influenced shoppers, and anyone who wants to start brewing
without being overwhelmed. No experience required.

## Service Area
We ship everywhere. No location restrictions.

## Contact
Email: gentlevoyage.assistance@gmail.com

- Homepage: https://picklebrewing.com/

## Pricing
- 1-Gallon Brewing Starter Kit: $34.99
- 5-Gallon Brewing Starter Kit: $105.00
